ddls:
CREATE TABLE "rate_plans" (
  "rate_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate plan */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Long Term Firm, Short Term Firm, Interruptible) */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the rate plan (e.g., 1 to 2 years, 3 to 4 years, 5+ years) */,
  "demand_charge" TEXT /* Demand charge per GJ/d per month */,
  "commodity_charge" TEXT /* Commodity charge per GJ */,
  "unit_rate" TEXT /* Unit rate at 100% load factor per GJ */,
  "rate_plan_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the rate plan */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate plan becomes effective */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the rate plan is no longer applicable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the rate plan, including any special terms or conditions */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the rate plan is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rate plan was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information (phone, email) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_rate_plans" (
  "customer_rate_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer-rate plan relationship */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the customers table */,
  "rate_plan_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the rate_plans table */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer started using the rate plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer will stop using the rate plan */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_rate_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the customers table */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the energy usage */,
  "usage_gj" TEXT /* Amount of energy used in gigajoules (GJ) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "billing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each billing record */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the customers table */,
  "billing_date" TEXT /* Date of the billing */,
  "amount_due" TEXT /* Total amount due for the billing period */,
  "paid" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate whether the bill has been paid */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the billing record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the billing record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("billing_id")
)
